title: The Sisters
overview: Inspired by the famous fairy tale Tấm Cám, this bloody horror reimagining follows Cám, the half-sister of Tấm, as she navigates a dark and twisted world filled with familiar yet terrifying new characters and elements, offering a fresh but hauntingly familiar experience for the audience.
